description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a light wood grain finish on three sides and a contrasting front panel. The front features two doors, one of which is solid white with a small round hole, likely serving as a handle, while the other has four vertically aligned dark glass or opaque panels. The wardrobe stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The side panels are plain, showcasing the wood texture without any additional features. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces. The wardrobe appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood, with possible glass or acrylic inserts on the front.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe with a light wood grain finish and a front featuring both solid and dark panel sections. Its clean lines and minimalistic design make it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain wood grain doors with no visible handles or panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow, plain wood grain surface with no features.
description_view_2: Alternate front view revealing a white door with a small round hole and a door with four dark rectangular panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wood grain finish.
